title: Heteranthocidium cultratum
taxonomy: Heteranthocidium cultratum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in Thailand and Myanmar. The classification of this plant places it in the genus Heteranthocidium and the family Rubiaceae. The genus Heteranthocidium is a monotypic genus, meaning it only contains the single species Heteranthocidium cultratum. Further classification includes the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta.
